structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-07-15 Arizona is Home for Tucson and Pima County
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-07-15 15:30:26-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Arizona is Home is expanding to accommodate first-time homebuyers in Tucson and Pima County! In partnership with the Pima Homebuyers Solution program, Arizona is Home will be available at the end of July, with the specific date yet to be announced. Once the launch date has been provided by the program coordinators, a follow-up announcement will be shared to notify the Production Team.

PROGRAM DETAILS

*	$9000 downpayment assistance paired with the lowest market rate (rates TBD)
*	75 homebuyers will receive the assistance as a forgivable 30-year second lien (no payments, no interest)
*	Available to Arizona residents in Tucson and Pima County that are first-time homebuyers
*	Gross household income must not exceed 120% of AMI for Arizona (see attached flyer)
*	640+ FICO
*	45% DTI maximum 
*	No purchase price limits (follow agency guidelines)
*	SFR, Condo/Townhome, 2-4 Unit, and Manufactured Homes permitted

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	This offering is independent of our current Arizona is Home product through Home Plus, which has depleted funds through the rest of 2025. 

ATTACHMENTS

*	AMI by household size flyer

For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  

For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 

For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
